attributes.action: Change government policy on oil and gas exploration in the UK
attributes.additional_details: Immediately removed Edward Miliband from secretary of state for energy. And issue licenses to drill and frack to help with fuel security and the working men and women with the taxation burden. Until renewables are improved enough to take over , UK was the 5th largest oil producer, until net zero. Billions of pounds have been lost since Teresa May's forcing the UK into this unsuccessful policy.
attributes.background: Allow the oil and gas companies to drill and frack in the North sea and on land  , to secure the UK from fuel shortages in the future. And increase tax revenue to ease the burden on general taxation.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign these petitions which call for similar action: 

Lift the ban on new UK oil & gas exploration licences to improve energy security
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766352

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065

Reopen British oil and gas fields using taxpayer funds for UK use only
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/742116
